song.title: Glory To God
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C
song.lyrics:
[v1] . G C G Before the world was made . D/F# G Before you spoke it to be . C G You were the King of Kings . D/F# G Yeah You were, yeah You were And now You’re reigning still Enthroned above all things Angels and saints cry out We join them as we sing
[c] . C G Glory to God . D/F# Em Glory to God . C G D/F# Glory to God forever (repeat)
[v2] Creator God you gave Me breath so I could praise Your great and matchless name All my days, all my days So let my whole life be A blazing offering A life that shouts and sings The greatness of our King
[b] . C G Take my life and let it be . D/F# Em All for You and for Your glory . C G D/F# Take my life and let it be Yours
